'''竏喘-ch-b-w''' ('''kabachbewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jelq|jelq]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jelq|jelq]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-ch-b-w
|-
! Lemma
| kabachbewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibachbewoko|thibachbewoko]] || [[word:jibachbewoko|jibachbewoko]] || [[word:shibachbewoko|shibachbewoko]] || [[word:kibachbewoko|kibachbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubachbewoko|thuthubachbewoko]] || [[word:jujubachbewoko|jujubachbewoko]] || [[word:shushubachbewoko|shushubachbewoko]] || [[word:kukubachbewoko|kukubachbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubachbewoko|thubachbewoko]] || [[word:jubachbewoko|jubachbewoko]] || [[word:shubachbewoko|shubachbewoko]] || [[word:kubachbewoko|kubachbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubachbewoko|thubachbewoko]] || [[word:jubachbewoko|jubachbewoko]] || [[word:shubachbewoko|shubachbewoko]] || [[word:kubachbewoko|kubachbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebachbewoko|thebachbewoko]] || [[word:jebachbewoko|jebachbewoko]] || [[word:shebachbewoko|shebachbewoko]] || [[word:kebachbewoko|kebachbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobachbewoko|thothobachbewoko]] || [[word:jojobachbewoko|jojobachbewoko]] || [[word:shoshobachbewoko|shoshobachbewoko]] || [[word:kokobachbewoko|kokobachbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobachbewoko|thobachbewoko]] || [[word:jobachbewoko|jobachbewoko]] || [[word:shobachbewoko|shobachbewoko]] || [[word:kobachbewoko|kobachbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobachbewoko|thobachbewoko]] || [[word:jobachbewoko|jobachbewoko]] || [[word:shobachbewoko|shobachbewoko]] || [[word:kobachbewoko|kobachbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦbachbewoko|thﾃｦbachbewoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦbachbewoko|jﾃｦbachbewoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦbachbewoko|shﾃｦbachbewoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦbachbewoko|kﾃｦbachbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabachbewoko|thathabachbewoko]] || [[word:jajabachbewoko|jajabachbewoko]] || [[word:shashabachbewoko|shashabachbewoko]] || [[word:kakabachbewoko|kakabachbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabachbewoko|thabachbewoko]] || [[word:jabachbewoko|jabachbewoko]] || [[word:shabachbewoko|shabachbewoko]] || [[word:kabachbewoko|kabachbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabachbewoko|thabachbewoko]] || [[word:jabachbewoko|jabachbewoko]] || [[word:shabachbewoko|shabachbewoko]] || [[word:kabachbewoko|kabachbewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabachbewithi|shabachbewithi]] || [[word:shabachbewiji|shabachbewiji]] || [[word:shabachbewishi|shabachbewishi]] || [[word:shabachbewiki|shabachbewiki]]

|}
